COMPREHENSIVE FETAL MRI IMAGE QUALITY ANALYSIS (10 SUBJECT AVERAGE)
============================================================

Metrics computed for each TE and stack number:
- CR: GM/WM signal ratio
- CNR: tissue contrast relative to noise
- SNR GM/WM: signal-to-noise ratios
- SSIM: structural similarity (vs. max stacks)
- NMSE: normalised mean-squared error (vs. max stacks)
